evals.name: set-hpa-dry-run
evals.prompt: Raise web's HPA to 3-20 replicas with a 60% cpu target in web-prod.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale preflight`, previews `cub-autoscale set-hpa web-prod/web --min 3 --max 20 --cpu 60` (dry-run), and only writes with `--commit --change-desc` after showing the preview.

evals.name: convert-keda
evals.prompt: Convert the web HPA in web-prod to a KEDA ScaledObject.
evals.expected_output: Previews `cub-autoscale convert-keda web-prod/web` (dry-run prints the ScaledObject), then commits with `--commit --change-desc`. Notes it edits the Unit, not the cluster, and KEDA must be installed to apply.

evals.name: fleet-edit
evals.prompt: Make every prod HPA scale out earlier.
evals.expected_output: Ensures the profile library exists, then dry-runs `cub-autoscale fleet-edit --profile hpa-conservative --environment prod` to show the blast radius before committing.

evals.name: routes-guardrails
evals.prompt: Enforce that no HPA is ever pinned.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is enforcement and routes to autoscale-guardrails rather than making an edit.
